title: Large language models often prioritize Western moral values, overlooking other cultures
description: Large language artificial intelligence models, such as ChatGPT, often misjudge what people outside the West might value as a moral priority.
content:
Large language artificial intelligence models, such as ChatGPT, often misjudge what people outside the West might value as a moral priority, according to our new research published in the Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences.

title: Germany saw 370 per cent rise in Indian students' applications in January
description: Indian student applications to Germany increased significantly this year. Artificial intelligence and data programs saw the fastest growth in student interest. Students now evaluate Germany for career returns and post-study work options. This trend aligns with Germany's demand for skilled workers in technology. Germany offers affordability and clear pathways for study-to-work opportunities.

title: New York blocks new AI data centers in first statewide moratorium
description: New York will block new large data centers that fuel artificial intelligence for up to a year to protect the environment and energy grid
content:
